message:
fix: add missing eprocess.rs, fix type errors, clean up dead uring-fs refs

- Create fsqlite-types/src/eprocess.rs (was declared in lib.rs but missing)
- Fix should_shed priority check: use <= (not <) so threshold is inclusive
- Fix i16/i32 mismatch in check_reserved_lock (posix_getlk)
- Fix delete.limit.offset → limit.offset in semantic resolver
- Remove dead cfg-gated functions referencing removed uring-fs features

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
